description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a geometric, rectilinear design. The facade features a mix of white, gray, and dark panels, with large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors that open onto a spacious patio and pool area. The house includes multiple balconies and terraces, as well as a prominent garage door on one side. The rear of the house is dominated by expansive glass walls, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoor pool and lounge area. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing open spaces and functional outdoor living.
description: A sleek, modern two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and a spacious pool patio. The exterior combines white, gray, and dark panels for a contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage door, and a mix of white and dark facade panels.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the flat roof, private balconies, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring expansive glass walls, a large patio, and a swimming pool with steps leading into the water.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible terraces, flat roof sections, and a more enclosed wall structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows and sliding glass doors in asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flush door, minimal overhang, and integrated garage; no porch or decorative columns.
